description: High-performance Harbor proxy-cache router — real-time operational dashboard

panels.title: Requests/sec by Type

panels.description: Incoming request rate broken down by HTTP status class (2xx, 3xx, 4xx, 5xx)
panels.title: Requests/sec by Status

panels.description: Incoming request rate broken down by HTTP method (GET, HEAD)
panels.title: Requests/sec by Method

panels.description: Image-specific request rate by type (manifest vs blob)
panels.title: Image Requests by Type

panels.description: Manifest resolution latency at p50, p95, and p99 percentiles
panels.title: Manifest Resolution Duration

panels.title: Manifest Resolution by Result (p99)

panels.title: Blob Proxy Duration

panels.title: Upstream Duration by Project (p95)

panels.description: Cache hit rate percentage over time — higher is better
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate Over Time

panels.description: Cache lookup operations per second broken down by result (hit vs miss)

panels.title: Upstream Requests by Project

panels.description: Rate of non-200 upstream responses per project — indicates upstream issues
panels.title: Upstream Errors by Project

panels.description: Circuit breaker state per upstream project: Closed (healthy), Open (tripped), Half-Open (probing)
panels.title: Circuit Breaker State

panels.description: Rate of retry attempts per project and reason (timeout, connection, server_error)
panels.title: Retries by Project & Reason
